case_title: GUILLERMO CANO VS. BAYSHORE WASH LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG . PLAINTIFF GUILLERMO CANO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAYSHORE WASH LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEFF DOMICH, MANAGING PARTNER. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE AS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS WAS NOT SERVED. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
